theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, dark-mode-first aesthetic inspired by Anthropic, OpenAI, and Mistral. It merges the technical, crisp, developer-forward structure of Archetype 4 with the moody, premium, and trustworthy editorial feel of Archetype 5. The design relies on high-contrast text, minimal structural elements, and subtle use of cyan/violet accents to communicate 'capable, trustworthy, intelligent' without feeling like a flashy tech startup.

usage_rules.accents: Cyan and Violet must be used extremely sparingly. Use them for 1px glowing borders (tracing beams), subtle hover states, or small decorative data nodes. DO NOT use large full-screen gradients. Keep the overall look monochrome (95%) with 5% color for function and emphasis.
usage_rules.glassmorphism: Use 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism for sticky nav and floating elements: bg-[#0B0F19]/70, heavy backdrop-blur-xl, with a delicate 1px inner border of border-white/10.

usage_rules.headings_override: The user requested Inter for headings, but to avoid the 'template AI smell' and meet the premium Anthropic/Mistral standard, Cabinet Grotesk (or a similar modern premium display font like Satoshi) must be used for Headings. Inter is strictly preserved for Body text to maintain SaaS legibility.
usage_rules.letter_spacing: All headings > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter. Labels/Overlines MUST be uppercase, text-xs, with tracking-[0.2em].

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for section padding. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

services_projects.description: Dense, crisp bento boxes with 1px border-white/10. High-tech, organized, utilizing all space effectively.

experience.description: Left column (col-span-4) for years/company, right column (col-span-8) for role and impact. Clean, highly scannable, data-focused.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#111827), 1px solid border (border-white/10). No soft shadows. On hover, translate-y-[-2px] and change border to border-white/25.
surfaces.buttons: Primary: Solid #00D4FF background with dark text (#0B0F19), sharp rounded-md. Secondary: Transparent with border-white/20 and text-white, hover border-white/40.

navigation.styles: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0F19]/80 border-b border-white/10
navigation.features: Bilingual EN/FR toggle, Link to main sections, Primary CTA (Book Meeting), CV Download icon.

hero.layout: Grid-based or overlapping split. Strong positioning statement on left, conceptual AI visual on right or subtle abstract background.
hero.features: Dual CTA: 'Book a Meeting' (Primary) and 'Download CV' (Secondary). Subtext highlighting CIFRE PhD availability.

projects.style: Bento-style project cards with subtle image overlay. Use max-h-[250px] for images to keep them constrained.
projects.features: Tags for tech stack (Python, Azure, RAG). Links to case studies or GitHub.

experience.style: Minimalist chronological list. Typography-heavy. Emphasis on impact and quantifiable results.

contact_and_booking.style: Embedded Calendly widget integrated seamlessly into the dark theme, paired with a custom Shadcn form for standard inquiries.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling to provide a premium, weighty momentum to the page.
motion_and_interaction.framer_motion: Subtle entrance fades (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0). Duration 0.5s. Staggered reveals for bento grids.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp transitions. transition-all duration-300. Buttons scale by 0.98 on active.

profile_photo.description: Professional black man in suit with a dark background. To be used in the About section or Hero.

projects.description: Abstract black and white multimodal pattern representing GenAI architecture.
Minimal dark server rack representing cloud engineering and MLOps.
Purple and pink abstract lights representing complex neural data.

icons.usage: Use sparingly. Primarily for CV download buttons, external links (LinkedIn, GitHub), and small tech tags.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case representing their role. Examples: `data-testid="nav-book-meeting-button"`, `data-testid="hero-download-cv"`, `data-testid="language-toggle"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided (#0B0F19, #111827). Do not introduce unauthorized shades of gray that mud the contrast.
Build a dual language context (React Context or simple state) for EN/FR toggling.
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' for structural layout if it restricts the bento grid. Use raw div with Tailwind classes for precise 1px borders and grid-cols.
Ensure the Calendly widget is dark-mode compatible via its embed URL parameters (theme=dark).
DO NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the Unsplash/Pexels URLs provided in 'media_and_assets'.
